title: Add Quarter and Annual Calendar Views
excerpt: It would be so helpful to view more than 1 month in the Calendar view for future planning purposes. As of right now, the only calendar views available are limited to 1 month, 1 week, 1 day. For planners using this platfo…

posts.author: NancyP (Nancy Pass)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be so helpful to view more than 1 month in the Calendar view for future planning purposes. As of right now, the only calendar views available are limited to 1 month, 1 week, 1 day. For planners using this platform, having the ability to see ahead with the multiple filters you have available would make this planning tool even more helpful!

posts.author: charlest1 (Charles Tran)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I would love to see multi month views. Being able to select months and then combining those months into a dashboard or view would be ideal so see what is going on in the next couple of months or years. We need more votes on this!

posts.author: shepponstall (Sarah Hepponstall)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, was hoping to see if there had been any progress on having multi month views available for the Calendar feature?

posts.author: Fabiana (Fabiana Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. At least having the annual view as an option inside calendar would be very helpful.

posts.author: Claudia413 (Claudia E)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

If you’re still looking for a better calendar view with multiple months and even a year overview I can recommend Calendar Plus in the marketplace. It’s free and offers year overview in addition to the usual month, week and day views.

https://monday.com/marketplace/10000475

This is what the year view looks like:

CalendarPlusYearView2237×1672 247 KB

I helped build this app and we regularly build new features for people who demand more from their calendars. We’ll be improving it regularly but if you have specific wishes, we’d be happy to hear them!

posts.author: Roberta (Roberta)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to add a filer for Milestones? I don’t want all dates in either Deadline or Timeline on the calendar.

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @NancyP, I agree that having a longer-range calendar view would be very useful for planning ahead. Our MasterPlan Calendar offers flexible views and filters that can help with this kind of forward planning. It might cover much of what you’re looking for.

Try it out with our free trial: https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000472/calendar-masterplan
